sequence.subject: Welcome to Brewed Awakening
sequence.preview_text:
How Brewed Awakening is a specialty coffee shop in 
Mumbai serving hand-crafted beverages made from 
single-origin beans sourced directly from Coorg 
and Chikmagalur farms. Our new winter seasonal 
menu launches this week featuring 6 new drinks 
including hazelnut latte, spiced chai cold brew, 
dark chocolate mocha, and a signature Mumbai 
cutting chai fusion. All drinks are available 
for dine-in, takeaway, and delivery via Zomato 
and Swiggy. helps Coffee lovers aged 20-35 in Mumbai, working  professionals in BKC and Lower Parel, college  students near campuses, people who treat coffee  as a daily ritual not just a caffeine fix
sequence.html_body:
Welcome

Thanks for checking out Brewed Awakening. We built this for Coffee lovers aged 20-35 in Mumbai, working professionals in BKC and Lower Parel, college students near campuses, people who treat coffee as a daily ritual not just a caffeine fix.

Brewed Awakening is a specialty coffee shop in Mumbai serving hand-crafted beverages made from single-origin beans sourced directly from Coorg and Chikmagalur farms. Our new winter seasonal menu launches this week featuring 6 new drinks including hazelnut latte, spiced chai cold brew, dark chocolate mocha, and a signature Mumbai cutting chai fusion. All drinks are available for dine-in, takeaway, and delivery via Zomato and Swiggy.

sequence.subject: How to get value from Brewed Awakening
sequence.preview_text: A short playbook to move from setup to results
sequence.html_body:
Value Guide

Start with one measurable goal: Launch a seasonal menu campaign for Brewed Awakening, a specialty coffee shop in Mumbai, to increase walk-in customers and online orders for our new winter drinks collection featuring hand-crafted hazelnut lattes, spiced chai cold brew, and dark chocolate mocha.

Our key differentiator is Only Mumbai coffee shop using directly sourced Indian single-origin beans for specialty drinks at cafe prices, not luxury prices. Real local ingredients, real craft, no pretension..
